sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80630" key="penta/eidos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντάειδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶδος</foreign> IV) <sense id="n80630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">composed of five ingredients</tr_>, of a remedy, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
